meaning: n.免疫病理学(研究体液和细胞免疫因子所造成的病理损伤)
examples: Objective To investigate the immunopathology mechanism of white cell IL 6 and t cell subspecies in retinal detachment disease.
He completed his residency with a focus on immunology, followed by a four-year fellowship at Massachusetts General Hospital (MGH) in immunology and immunopathology.
Prior to venturing into the financial world, Mr. Wolfe published cutting-edge AIDS-immunopathology research in Cell Vision and The Journal of Leukocyte Biology, leading medical-immunology journals.
